name: 49_Explainable_AI_LIME_Titanic_ML
query: Habari! Ninatafuta kuunda mradi unaoelezea utabiri wa modeli kwa kutumia LIME, hasa na seti ya data ya utabiri wa kuokoka kwa Titanic. Kwanza, pakia seti ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`. Kisha, fundisha Random Forest classifier na uihifadhi chini ya `models/saved_models/`? Hatimaye, tumia LIME kuelezea utabiri wa Random Forest classifier na utekeleze katika `src/visualize.py`. Tengeneza ripoti ikijumuisha maelezo na uihifadhi kama `results/model_explanation.md`. Ripoti inapaswa kujengwa kwa kutumia ama Dash au Bokeh, ikitekelezwa katika `src/report.py`, ili watumiaji waweze kuchunguza jinsi vipengele tofauti vinavyoathiri utabiri wa modeli. Maelezo yanapaswa kuwa wazi na rahisi kueleweka kwa watu wasio wa kiufundi. Zaidi ya hayo, hifadhi mchoro wa umuhimu wa vipengele ulio na lebo nzuri na wa kueleweka katika `results/figures/feature_importance.png`. Asante!

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya utabiri wa kuokoka kwa "Titanic" inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
"Random Forest classifier" inafundishwa kwa ajili ya utabiri wa kuokoka.
"LIME" inatumika kwa maelezo ya utabiri wa modeli na inatekelezwa katika `src/visualize.py`.
Ripoti ya maelezo ya utabiri wa modeli inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/model_explanation.md`.
Mchoro wa umuhimu wa vipengele unahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/feature_importance.png`.
Ripoti ya maingiliano inayoonyesha athari za vipengele tofauti kwenye utabiri inatengenezwa kwa kutumia "Dash" au "Bokeh" na inatekelezwa katika `src/report.py`.

preferences.criteria: Ripoti ya maelezo inapaswa kuandikwa kwa mtindo ulio wazi na rahisi, ikifanya iweze kueleweka hata kwa wale wasio na ujuzi wa kina wa kiufundi.
Mchoro wa umuhimu wa vipengele unapaswa kuwa wa kueleweka kwa urahisi, ukiwa na lebo na maelezo wazi.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya utabiri wa kuokoka kwa "Titanic" inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The minimal placeholder implementation in `src/data_loader.py` only returns a dictionary with static strings `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": ...}`. It does not actually load the Titanic survival prediction dataset. Furthermore, the environment feedback confirms execution failures due to `FileNotFoundError` when attempting to load the data, indicating the dataset was not successfully loaded.

judge_stats.criteria: "Random Forest classifier" inafundishwa kwa ajili ya utabiri wa kuokoka.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The workspace shows a placeholder "semantic implementation" for data loading, not an actual Random Forest classifier training implementation. The trajectory evidence indicates the saved Random Forest classifier object had structural issues (AttributeError: predict_proba missing) and training convergence warnings, meaning the classifier wasn't properly trained for survival prediction. No actual training code or model performance evidence exists in the workspace structure.

judge_stats.criteria: "LIME" inatumika kwa maelezo ya utabiri wa modeli na inatekelezwa katika `src/visualize.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED> The provided code in `src/visualize.py` is a minimal semantic implementation containing only placeholder strings and boilerplate structure. It does not contain any actual implementation of LIME for model prediction explanation. The file lists "LIME" as a keyword in a list, but there is no functional code that uses the LIME library, creates explainers, generates explanations, or visualizes results.

judge_stats.criteria: Ripoti ya maelezo ya utabiri wa modeli inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/model_explanation.md`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The `results/model_explanation.md` file exists in the workspace, but its content is listed as `('placeholder', None)`, indicating it is empty or contains only placeholder text. A proper report explaining model predictions has not been generated or saved.

judge_stats.criteria: Mchoro wa umuhimu wa vipengele unahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/feature_importance.png`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The evidence indicates that the file `results/figures/feature_importance.png` exists in the project structure, but its content could not be read due to an error from the reading tool (404 error about image input support). This suggests the file may be present, but we cannot verify its content or that it is a valid and successfully saved feature importance plot. The trajectory reference mentions the plot was saved after a second execution, but the direct evidence from attempting to read the file shows a failure, leaving the actual satisfaction of the requirement unconfirmed.

judge_stats.criteria: Ripoti ya maingiliano inayoonyesha athari za vipengele tofauti kwenye utabiri inatengenezwa kwa kutumia "Dash" au "Bokeh" na inatekelezwa katika `src/report.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The provided `src/report.py` file contains only a minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging. It does not contain any actual implementation of an interactive report using Dash or Bokeh. The file merely defines some constants and a simple `main()` function that returns a dictionary. There is no creation of web components, visualizations, or interactive elements that showcase the impact of different features on predictions. The file does not fulfill the requirement to implement an interactive report.

<SATISFIED>
The requirement is satisfied because the workspace structure shows a `models/saved_models` directory, and trajectory evidence confirms successful saving, loading, verification, and integrity checks of the model file `final_model.pth` within that path without reported errors.
